title: The Day Of The Beast
description: Introduces The Devil, a new boss fight in the game.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32b879b1cbdf0d3bf80b85e49c4b3e51232f9bf2_0.webp)

                                           About The Day of the Beast

The FazBrick Studios Team presents The Day of the Beast, a dark and disturbing Minecraft mod centered entirely around satanism, occult rituals, and psychological horror. Fully compatible with multiplayer and regularly updated for the latest versions of the game.

Face The Devil, a powerful and ruthless enemy that will test your skills to the limit. This boss fight is the core of the mod and provides a tough, intense challenge for players looking for a real fight.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c22b2e8cbc9c47350951b8e10360df0d8d508333.png)

                                            I can put this in Modpacks?
Of course! Feel free to add this mod to your modpacks. I encourage you to do so, just don't forget to give credit.

                                                   Getting Started
To progress in The Day of the Beast, you must hunt and kill goats scattered around the world. Each goat has a very low drop chance to give you a Goat Heart, making it extremely difficult to obtain. 

Combine the Goat Heart with a Nether Wart and Blaze Powder to craft a Demon Heart

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f15a0376fdb1228162348c4581f13f8ec8e6185c.png)

Once you have the heart, you will need to find a monument in the plains of the Minecraft world. Combined with the Demon Heart, this will generate a large structure where you can face this abomination of the world face to face.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0352cf1e6333401c470444f20869d2b3394a08b2_0.webp)

                                                    Boss Fight
When the monument is generated, The Devil will appear in an enormous size, summoning lightning and small demons while hurling large fireballs at you to counterattack. It will be immune to explosions and fire, but very weak to projectiles.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c4ea1add48836b9972febe7aa45e09f7093c6d9.png)

In its second phase, it will return to its original size and become much weaker and stronger, trading power for great attack speed and abilities. It will chase you throughout the arena, jumping and stalking you while charging, summoning ally demons, and launching flames to scorch you. It constantly regenerates, making this final phase the most difficult and challenging.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f7c31ceefaa28dccc290f1530dd936fa161917c.png)

When you deplete its entire health bar, it will kneel down and disappear amidst a malevolent laugh and smoke, leaving you with a special item as a reward.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c22b2e8cbc9c47350951b8e10360df0d8d508333.png)

                                            Redistribution License
You are not allowed to upload or redistribute this mod on websites or domains other than Curseforge. 

This specifically includes RU-Minecraft.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/763df986484ee7c89cefde7f1d3a60de2fdb7472.png)
